articles.title: 'Time to stop': Trump vows Israel will not annex West Bank
articles.summary: 📰 싱가포르 최신 뉴스\n📢 'Time to stop': Trump vows Israel will not annex West Bank...
articles.content: "I will not allow Israel to annex the West Bank. Nope, I will not allow it. It's not going to happen," Trump told reporters in the Oval Office. "There's been enough. It's time to stop now," he said. Netanyahu's office did not immediately respond to a request for comment on Trump's remarks.

articles.title: Serangoon North mosque evacuated after suspicious parcel found on premises
articles.summary:
📰 법률 관련 뉴스
📢 Serangoon North mosque evacuated after suspicious parcel found on premises
articles.content: The Al-Istiqamah Mosque in Serangoon North was evacuated after a suspicious parcel was delivered there. Police officers and SCDF are at scene to assess and manage the situation. The area had also been cordoned off, with curious residents looking on at some areas. The hazmat vehicles left at about 9.25pm and about 9.35pm respectively.
